narrative:
Broadview Heights-01-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,135 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.3 percentage points.
